name: ret_is_zero
reason: If the return value is zero, there is no usable physical address space, indicating a degenerate spec.

name: ret_below_32bit_mask
reason: If the max physical address is strictly below a 32-bit mask, the width axiom lower bound of 32 is violated.

name: ret_exceeds_52bit_range
reason: If the mask reaches or exceeds 2^52, it contradicts the upper bound on MAX_PHYADDR_WIDTH and could allow out-of-range physical addresses.

name: ret_is_usize_max
reason: If the max physical address equals usize::MAX, the mask imposes no effective upper bound, defeating address-space isolation.

name: ret_is_even
reason: A bitmask of the form (1<<w)-1 with w>=1 is always odd; an even result would indicate an off-by-one or shift error in the spec.
